functional_audit.check: Onboarding questionnaire components render Q/A from centralized enum modules, not inline hardcoded question arrays
Performance step selects role-keyed question set (5 per role) based on onboarding role state

critiques.finding: OnboardingScaleAnswer and OnboardingScaleQuestion interfaces are declared twice in onboardingQuestions.ts (lines 9–22 and 448–461); harmless at compile time but adds noise.
critiques.alternative: Remove the duplicate interface block before STABILITY_QUESTIONS and rely on the top-of-file definitions.

critiques.finding: OnboardingPerformance.tsx keeps static pro-oriented heading copy ('How you're showing up professionally') even when student/caregiver/transition/retired question sets are shown; enum wiring is correct but shell copy is not role-adaptive.
critiques.alternative: Defer role-specific step titles to AUTH-04/consumer UI items or add per-role title maps alongside PERFORMANCE_QUESTIONS_BY_ROLE.

critiques.finding: Some performance answer slugs mirror Bubble duplicate disambiguation suffixes (e.g. quickly0, more0); labels are correct but slugs are awkward for future API keys.
critiques.alternative: Document that slugs are Bubble-faithful db_value keys; normalize only if Supabase schema requires cleaner keys.

independent_verification.prior_fix_now_C-1_detail: Rewrite added all 25 role-keyed performance questions (was 5 pro-only); bubble cross-check confirms exact match on role-keyed question bubbleIds
